speaker: Unknown
text: Oh, Professor Derich? *paw prints*

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, Argo!

speaker: Argo
text: Are you doing some shopping?

speaker: Diederich
text: I'm a bit hungry.

speaker: Diederich
text: I know! Since we're here, why don't we grab a bite to eat? My treat!

speaker: Argo
text: Really? Thank you!

speaker: Argo
text: I've never eaten at the canteen before... Is there something you recommend?

speaker: Diederich
text: There is. How about I buy it for you?

speaker: Argo
text: Sounds good!

speaker: Professor Derich
text: goes and picks something out, then pays for it.

speaker: Diederich
text: Here! *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: What is this?

speaker: Unknown
text: What he got for me is what looks like a sausage cut into slices with some kind of white sauce on top.

speaker: Diederich
text: This is called "Kamilwurst".

speaker: Argo
text: Never heard of it... Is this sausage?

speaker: Diederich
text: Yep, it's sausage with a certain kind of sauce. It was introduced by someone called Kamil, hence the name "Kamilwurst".

speaker: Unknown
text: It looks amazing...

speaker: Diederich
text: Go on, try it! Before it gets cold!

speaker: Argo
text: Don’t mind if I do! 🐾

speaker: Unknown
text: I throw a piece of it into my mouth.

speaker: Narration
text: *The juices from the piping hot sausage and the mild white sauce combine, creating a harmoniously savory flavor.*

speaker: Argo
text: Th-That's so good! 😊

speaker: Diederich
text: Isn't it? This is a traditional dish from Harshriech.

speaker: Unknown
text: What? From Harshreich?

speaker: Diederich
text: The white sauce on top is made from goat's milk.

speaker: Unknown
text: G-Goats...?

speaker: Diederich
text: Unlike the sprawling plains we have here in Frontail, Harshreich is a mountainous country. They got more goats grazin’ there than cows.

speaker: Diederich
text: That sausage is made from lamb, too. Different terrain means different livestock, and different livestock means different food...

speaker: Diederich
text: That flavor is somethin' that could only come from Harshreich.

speaker: Argo
text: Makes sense... Different types of cooking come from different countries...

speaker: Diederich
text: Right. Even a country with someone like Theo as its prince can make food this damn good!

speaker: Argo
text:
I’m so tired of this place… *paw prints*

Narration
*the rain pours down relentlessly*

speaker: Diederich
text: You can't judge a country on just one thing. Just like people, they have lots of different sides to 'em.

speaker: Argo
text: I know, professor. I believe even Theo has things to like about him.

speaker: Argo
text: It doesn’t matter how he acts, I won’t hate his whole country just because of him.

speaker: Diederich
text: Really? I guess you already understand. I’ll stay out of your business, then. *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: But I'm glad you introduced me to his country's food.

speaker: Diederich
text: Good, eat your fill and get stronger.

speaker: Unknown
text: Diederich's affection went up! *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: Come to think of it... You're always open to talk to me, but...

speaker: Argo
text: It doesn’t seem like I get to talk to Professor Celio that much. *paw*

speaker: Diederich
text: He... prefers to keep to himself

speaker: Diederich
text: Besides, don’t you think there should be some distance between professors and students?

speaker: Unknown
text: Is he distant even with you?

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, it's not like we hate each other’s guts. I think we get along just fine, but... it still kinda feels like he's distant.

speaker: Diederich
text: When it comes down to it, maybe even I only know what he’s like on the outside.

speaker: Argo
text:
I’m so tired… *sigh*

Narration
*The rain pours relentlessly.*

speaker: Diederich
text: All that junk he leaves layin' around his room... maybe that's the key to gettin' to know him.

speaker: Unknown
text: Did you say... junk?

speaker: Diederich
text: There's a lotta weird stuff piled up in there.

speaker: Diederich
text: You'd think he’d be a neat freak with a spotless room, but nope! It’s a total trash heap!

speaker: Diederich
text: Maybe it means a lot to him in the same way the sea does to me.

speaker: Professor Celio
text: Professor Celio's room is covered in junk...?

speaker: Argo
text: What do you think of Julius?

speaker: Diederich
text: Hmm. He's damn strong.

speaker: Unknown
text: Strong...? Even you think so?

speaker: Diederich
text: I'm not the only one. I don't think anyone's beaten him in a one-on-one fight.

speaker: Argo
text: Really...? He's that good of a fencer?

speaker: Diederich
text: It's not that he's good at it... He just has an E.P. that lets him cheat.

speaker: Unknown
text: Cheat...?

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, it's not a good idea to go blabberin' on about someone else’s E.P.

speaker: Diederich
text: If you really wanna know, go ask Julius yourself.

speaker: Argo
text: O-Okay.

speaker: Unknown
text: (An E.P. that lets him cheat...? What kind of E.P. is that...?)

speaker: Argo
text: If you’ll excuse me, Professor Derich.

speaker: Diederich
text: All right, see ya later. Don’t forget your trainin’

speaker: Argo
text: I won't!
